$comment: Source of truth for what every trial must run on.
Generated initially by hand; future updates via scripts/generate-lockfile.sh.
Verify before each trial via scripts/verify-versions.sh.

cohort_size._comment: trials_per_cell is the canonical N for power analysis. Trials 4 and 5 executed and aggregated 2026-05-16/17; all 8 tools × 3 tasks now run 5 trials × 3 rounds (40 labels/task, 75 judgments per (tool,task) cell, 1800 corpus). Aggregator unions the label root + ^round[0-9]+$ subdirs across all trial subdirs present.
cohort_size.rationale: n=3 MDE under-estimated true trial-to-trial variance; the n=3→n=5 expansion RAISED σ_pool and MDE on every task (feature 17.99→17.21, bugfix 22.83→19.73, refactor 13.87→39.18) — see results/power-analysis.json and PAPER §4. The rising-MDE result is itself why post-hoc selective reruns are barred.

version_history.2026-05-08_pin_bumped: 2.1.133 pinned via $BENCH_CLAUDE_BIN; 7 prior trials reset for rerun (Uniform, Yankee, Cipher, Bravo, Iron, Foxtrot, Beacon)
version_history.2026-05-08_full_cohort_reset: All 72 trials wiped + tools bumped to latest stable. claude_cli 2.1.133 unchanged.

judges._comment: Locked 2026-04-26 P4 canary as 4-judge; gpt54pro promoted 2026-05-07 after Uniform 3-round stability test (σ=5.13, best in panel; mean=95.7 — harshest scorer, ~35-65pt below others). 5 vendors: Anthropic / xAI / Z.ai / OpenAI / Xiaomi. Note (2026-05-16): gpt54pro slot routing flipped to cliproxy/gpt-5.4 for t4+ trials — see judges.gpt54pro.routing_history.
judges._weight_comment: Weights are operator-chosen, pre-registered 2026-05-12. Anthropic (opus) and OpenAI (gpt54pro) carry more weight as canonical and harshest scorers respectively; other vendors at weight 1. This lockfile is the pre-registered source of record; the values are mirrored as a hardcoded constant in scripts/aggregate-results.sh and kept in sync manually (the aggregator does not parse this file).

routing_history._comment: Slot name kept as 'gpt54pro' for aggregation continuity with t1-t3 JSONs. Upstream model changes effective t4+ (per operator request 2026-05-16 — local cliproxy was preferred but does not expose gpt-5.4-pro; gpt-5.4 was the closest available model). Re-judging t1-t3 was not triggered; per-task aggregation now contains a heterogeneous gpt54pro signal (t1-t3 = gpt-5.4-pro via OpenAI /v1/responses, t4+ = gpt-5.4 via cliproxy /v1/chat/completions). Document in any rank comparison that crosses t1-t3 vs t4+ on the gpt54pro lane.

pure.note: stock Claude CLI; no plugin/marketplace install. Reproducibility = claude_cli.version above.

claudekit.source: a private Infina fork of claudekit
claudekit._note: Pinned to a private Infina fork of claudekit master HEAD (already at origin/master tip 2026-04-25). Fork has unrelated history with upstream `carlrannaberg/claudekit` — `git merge` refuses; no shared ancestor. The fork is treated as the source of truth for v2 claudekit trials; upstream is referenced for context, not merged.

gstack._note: Bumped 2026-05-08 from 1.12.2.0 (62091639). Cloned by setup-tool-config.sh; checkout to this SHA after clone.

omc._note: Bumped 2026-05-08 from v4.13.4 (c1cd5d08). tag_sha is the commit SHA the plugin installer records.

compound._note: Bumped 2026-05-08 from v3.1.0 (ea8721eb). Entry point /compound-engineering:lfg unchanged.

superpower._note: Repo has no release tags; SHA is the only stable handle. Captured 2026-05-08 from setup-tool-config superpower 1 install. Bumped from v5.0.7/c4bbe651.

cohort_reset_2026_05_08._comment: Full v2 cohort reset. All 72 trials wiped, judge JSONs deleted, tool versions bumped to latest stable per CLAUDE.md cohort-rerun-symmetry rule.
